'''''Mercatan''''' was a [[Naboo (people)/Legends|Naboo]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] in use before and during the time of the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]. Before the invasion, it was in the same fleet as ''[[Charm's Way]]'' during a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] attack.

During the war, the ship participated in a [[Raid on the Solleu River|raid]] on prison camps conducted by [[Bravo Squadron/Legends|Bravo Flight]] and [[Rescue Flight]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Starfighter (video game)|''Star Wars: Starfighter'']] {{1st}}
